hero.recommended_use: Homepage, academy, menu builder, account, about, and broad learning hero sections

community.recommended_use: Hospitality, hosting, family cooking, kids cooking, community table, and gathering moments

fallback_behavior: App image helpers try the /images slot first. If the file is missing, the global image error handler swaps in the registered safe /assets fallback.
content_attachment_rule: Every cuisine photo used in the app must have matching content in app.js imageContentRegistry: a recipe route, lesson route, cuisine guide, hosting guide, or menu planner route. Run window.auditLetsCookImageContent() in the browser console after adding images or recipes.
